Message from the

Our Principal's Vision

"
At Nexus Academy, we believe that every child is a unique constellation of talents waiting to be discovered. Our mission is not merely to educate but to inspire — to ignite the flame of curiosity, nurture resilience, and build the character that will carry our students through life's greatest challenges. We are proud of our legacy and even more excited about our future.
Dr. Kavindra Perera
Principal, Nexus Academy
Our Purpose

Vision & Mission

Vision

"To be a centre of excellence that empowers every learner to reach their full potential and contribute meaningfully to a global society."

Mission

"Providing a holistic, inclusive, and innovative education that nurtures intellectual curiosity, ethical values, and a lifelong love of learning."

Stay Updated

Latest News

news2026-02-28

Term 2 Results Published

We are pleased to announce that Term 2 examination results are now available on the student portal. Students can log in to view their detailed marksheet and download their result slip.

news2026-02-20

Annual Sports Meet 2026

The Annual Sports Meet will be held on March 15th at the main grounds. All students are encouraged to participate. Registration closes on March 5th.

blog2026-02-10

New Science Lab Inauguration

We are thrilled to announce the inauguration of our state-of-the-art science laboratory, equipped with modern apparatus for Chemistry, Physics, and Biology experiments.
